description_long: This is a rectangular table with a flat, slightly beveled top surface that appears to be made of a smooth, light-colored material, possibly painted or laminated wood. The tabletop is supported by four straight, sturdy legs made of a darker wood, giving the table a modern yet classic appearance. The legs are positioned at the corners, providing stability and ample legroom underneath. The design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements, drawers, or additional features. The table's proportions suggest it is suitable for dining, working, or communal use in urban environments such as parks, plazas, or outdoor cafes. Its robust construction and neutral color palette make it versatile for various public or semi-public settings.
description: A rectangular table with a light, smooth top and four dark wooden legs, featuring a clean, minimalistic design. Suitable for urban outdoor or indoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, light-colored tabletop and two of the four dark wooden legs.
description_view_1: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and two supporting legs.
description_view_2: Side view, revealing the same tabletop and leg structure, with no additional features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the previous side, with the same clean lines and materials.
